puzzleDescription: The final test for conditionals! Determine if a student passed or failed based on the standard passing mark of 75.
objective: Print 'Pass' if the grade is 75 or higher, otherwise print 'Fail'.
hints: Use 'if (grade >= 75)' to check the passing condition.
The 'else' block should handle any grade below 75.
Make sure to capitalize 'Pass' and 'Fail' exactly as requested.
